_note: Reviewer follow-up #6: a named-slot consumer child of `<svelte:component>` / `<svelte:self>` (e.g. `<span slot="header" let:title>`) must destructure from the parent component's `$$slot_def["header"]`. Pre-fix the special-element path passed only `has_let_bindings` for the hoist signal and walked children via plain `emit_template_node` instead of `walk_child_with_slot_let`, so the parent instance never got hoisted and the named-slot wrapper destructure never landed — the inner `let:title` binding referenced an undeclared name. Post-fix the path pre-scans children for `child_is_slot_let_consumer`, hoists when any exists, and routes through `walk_child_with_slot_let` so the consumer wrapper destructures against the synthetic component's `$$slot_def["header"]`. Mirrors `emit_component_node`'s pre-scan + walk pattern.
